headlines.title: 5 takeaways from President Donald Trump's interview with CNBC
headlines.summary: The president defended his family's business and said he feels bad that the presidency creates a conflict of interest in any of his children's investments.

headlines.title: First known congressional SpaceX stock buys surface after record IPO
headlines.summary: The SpaceX stock purchases come as Elon Musk’s company deepens its role in federal contracting and remains closely tied to President Donald Trump’s Washington.

headlines.title: Ford achieves quality milestone, as CEO targets flawless new vehicle launches
headlines.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley told CNBC that the automaker has learned from its past quality and recall issues, which have hurt its earnings and stained its reputation.

headlines.title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100 million New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
headlines.summary: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.

headlines.title: Extreme heat wave threatens U.S. power grids and July 4 travel
headlines.summary: The heat wave threatens to overwhelm U.S. grids and may force some to change their plans on one of the busiest travel weeks of the year.

headlines.title: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
headlines.summary: Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle — are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday.

headlines.title: Tech bulls lose conviction as key trading metric blows out to the widest since 2008
headlines.summary: The pick-up in demand for puts aligns with slowing momentum in AI stocks that had been consistently rewarding speculators to the upside.

headlines.title: Most prediction market contracts have low volume, leaving users exposed to volatility and bots
headlines.summary: Prediction market volume has grown exponentially but several markets never make it over $10,000.

headlines.title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
headlines.summary: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."

headlines.title: Bulls are betting big on this global ETF that's deep in a bear market
headlines.summary: U.S. stocks just keep winning, with the Nasdaq closing out its best quarter since 2020. Across the globe in China, things couldn't be more different.

headlines.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
headlines.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."

headlines.title: Micron's monster post-earnings rally is almost gone. Traders divided on where it goes next
headlines.summary: The maker of memory chips slid to start the week, marking an about-face from its post-earnings surge.

headlines.title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in July 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
headlines.summary: Why it’s a good month to save on streaming, despite the return of ‘Enola Holmes’ to Netflix and ‘Silo’ to Apple

headlines.title: Record beef imports are flooding the U.S. — so why is your Fourth of July BBQ so expensive?
headlines.summary: Beef prices are sizzling and Washington’s recipe for high costs — import more meat — only grills your wallet.

headlines.title: Your aging parent has a new romance. Here’s how to protect your inheritance — without looking greedy.
headlines.summary: Before your single mom or dad remarries, talk with them about estate-planning issues.

headlines.title: Opening a ‘Trump account’ for your children? Here is the risk you need to reckon with first.
headlines.summary: The new accounts ban bonds and international stocks, forcing parents to bet their children’s financial future entirely on U.S. equities.

headlines.title: ‘I don’t think I’ll make it to 80’: I’m 70 and single. Do I take out a reverse mortgage or a home-equity agreement?
Nvidia is betting on a trillion-dollar robotics boom. Here is the hidden way to trade it.
headlines.summary: CEO Jensen Huang has called humanoid robots a “multitrillion-dollar economic opportunity.”

suggested_changes: Trim META by ~6 share(s) to bring weight under 25%

Review and potentially exit underperforming positions like OKLO, NFLX, IREN, and FBL to improve overall portfolio health.

candidates.thesis: Advanced Micro Devices is a leader in AI and compute infrastructure, benefiting from secular growth in high-performance computing and AI workloads. Strong fundamentals and positioned well in the semiconductor space.
candidates.risk: Stop below 430 (recent support level), target 690 (near 52-week high).

candidates.thesis: ASML is the dominant supplier of lithography systems, critical for semiconductor manufacturing. It is a key enabler of AI and compute infrastructure growth, with strong barriers to entry in its industry.
candidates.risk: Stop below 1550 (recent support zone), target 2200 (secular growth potential).

candidates.thesis: Cloudflare is a leader in cybersecurity and edge computing, benefiting from the secular growth in internet infrastructure and security needs. Strong revenue growth and expanding market share.

GEV is a key player in clean energy infrastructure, specifically small modular reactors (SMRs). Positioned to benefit from global energy transition and increasing demand for reliable, low-carbon power sources.
candidates.risk: Stop below 1000 (recent support zone), target 1500 (secular growth potential).

candidates.thesis: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF provides diversified exposure to the semiconductor industry, which is central to AI, compute infrastructure, and secular growth tech themes.
candidates.risk: Stop below 540 (recent support), target 800 (secular growth potential).
